prompt: Create a full-body anime idol fashion illustration of an elegant young woman standing in a graceful three-quarter pose on a plain off-white background. She has soft light brown medium-length hair styled with one large side bun and loose face-framing strands, decorated with a blue-and-white flower kanzashi, dangling cords, beads, and tassels. Her face is softly obscured or left featureless, keeping the focus on the outfit. Design a glamorous Japanese-modern floral dress that fuses kimono, corset, and layered idol costume elements: a fitted white high-neck sleeveless blouse with tiny gold buttons, lace trim at the shoulders, and a small blue floral choker; a black underbust corset with gold eyelet lacing and ornate gold trim; a large royal-blue waist bow with a flower-shaped gold-and-blue brooch at the center; and an asymmetrical layered skirt with white ruffled underskirt, black translucent overskirt, and sheer navy-blue kimono panels. Include exactly 6 main outfit components: 1 white blouse, 1 black corset, 1 blue waist bow, 1 layered skirt, 2 wide kimono sleeves, and 1 pair of platform geta-style sandals. The two detached wide kimono sleeves should be deep navy with translucent fabric, gold edging, and vivid floral patterns, each sleeve hanging from the arms with tassel ornaments. The floral motif should include red camellias, white blossoms, small blue flowers, and delicate gold branches across the sleeves, skirt, bow, and footwear. Add ornate accessories: gold chain drapes at the waist, dangling tassels, flower brooches, a black thigh garter with a blue floral charm on one leg, white lace knee socks with navy straps, and black platform sandals with blue straps, red flower accents, and gold detailing. Use a refined gacha-game character art style with clean linework, soft cel shading, delicate fabric transparency, glossy gold accents, and high detail. Keep the composition centered, full body visible from head to shoes, with elegant negative space and no text, no watermark, no extra characters.
